ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Pearce (via court call) for (petitioner) Keiko Wong.

The Court asked counsel to talk about the information in the supplement and why an amendment was not filed. Mr. Pearce stated that the will is dated 5/31 on page 1, that it was executed the next day, that the will is attached to the petition and is clarified in the supplement, that they prefer not to have to file an amendment and re-publish, that there is no confusion as to which will it is as it is attached, that none of the beneficiaries have raised questions and cited 7.53 in that the Court has the ability to waive notice. The Court stated that it will waive notice and took the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
